finding_results.notes: Replaced the abstract afternoon bridge with lived deterioration on the page: failed self-bandaging and failed movement to the pod chair, loss of finger sensation, shivering that later stops, failed pressure transfer to the injured arm, thirst, slipping arithmetic, and repeated wound reopening before the fixed 4:47 PM endpoint.
Rebuilt the strike sentence around Noor's half-beat misread of the sound before recognition catches up, and removed the reused 'The sound is ...' template and banned adjective set.

The chapter now opens on terminal time and the 6 PM unlock countdown, uses Jae-won's watch as a second clock, keeps the survivor count compressed, and cuts the repeated decomposition-smell inventory instead of restating the established sweet/rot/copper/metal blend.
Verified revised chapter length at 3359 words while preserving the required '# Chapter 17' heading contract.

summary: Reweighted the opening around the countdown to 6 PM, replaced the repeated impact phrasing on Jae-won's death, expanded Noor's final hours into embodied present-time deterioration through 4:47 PM, and brought the chapter above the 3000-word floor without changing the required ending state.
